com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager

Class DeviceConfiguration

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.devicemanager.DeviceConfiguration

  • public class DeviceConfiguration
extends java.lang.Object
    Device configuration.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      DeviceConfiguration()
      Creates an instance without parameters.
      DeviceConfiguration(BaudRateMode baudRateMode, DecryptionMode workingKeyDecryptionMode, BeeperControl beeperControl)
      Creates an instance with specified parameters.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      BaudRateMode getBaudRateMode()
      Gets baud rate mode.
      BeeperControl getBeeperControl()
      Gets beeper control mode.

      Gets working key decryption mode.

      Sets baud rate mode.

      Sets beeper control mode.

      Sets working key decryption mode.

    • Constructor Detail

      • DeviceConfiguration

        public DeviceConfiguration()
        Creates an instance without parameters.

      • DeviceConfiguration

        public DeviceConfiguration(BaudRateMode baudRateMode,
                           DecryptionMode workingKeyDecryptionMode,
                           BeeperControl beeperControl)
        Creates an instance with specified parameters.
        Parameters:
        baudRateMode - Baud rate mode. See BaudRateMode
        workingKeyDecryptionMode - [Not yet supported] Working key decryption mode. See DecryptionMode
        beeperControl - [Not yet supported] Control when to beep. See BeeperControl

    • Method Detail

      • getBaudRateMode

        public BaudRateMode getBaudRateMode()
        Gets baud rate mode.

        Baud rate mode. See BaudRateMode

        Sets baud rate mode.

      • getWorkingKeyDecryptionMode

        Gets working key decryption mode.
        Returns:
        Working key decryption mode. See DecryptionMode

      • setWorkingKeyDecryptionMode

        public void setWorkingKeyDecryptionMode(DecryptionMode workingKeyDecryptionMode)
        Sets working key decryption mode.
        Parameters:
        workingKeyDecryptionMode - [Not yet supported] Working key decryption mode. See DecryptionMode

      • getBeeperControl

        public BeeperControl getBeeperControl()
        Gets beeper control mode.
        Returns:
        Beeper control mode. See BeeperControl

      • setBeeperControl

        public void setBeeperControl(BeeperControl beeperControl)
        Sets beeper control mode.
        Parameters:
        beeperControl - [Not yet supported] Beeper control mode. See BeeperControl
